fault_hypothesis: Lines 70-71 incorrectly pop the last element when both lists share the same last value, removing a legitimate duplicate. This post-processing block should not exist at all.

constraints.intent: After the pop, the merged list must still have exactly len(left)+len(right) elements, which is violated when both lists share a last element.
Inside the then-branch that pops an element, the resulting length must still equal the sum of input lengths.
Before returning, the merged list length must equal the total number of input elements.
The returned list must contain exactly as many elements as both inputs combined.
